childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Please Specify", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : "32000", "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Is there or has there been any indication the Patient has not or will not adhere to the drug dosing as prescribed?", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100.0, "optionHeight" : 100.0, "imageCountInRow" : 3.0, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: ElexacaftorTezacaftorIvacaftor_InitialSubmission_Assessment_Q1
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Ever receive a lung transplant? If yes, please provide the date.", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100.0, "optionHeight" : 100.0, "imageCountInRow" : 3.0, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: ElexacaftorTezacaftorIvacaftor_InitialSubmission_Assessment_Q3
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "For Trikafta patients, does the patient have a confirmed diagnosis of cystic fibrosis with at least one F508Del mutation in the CFTR gene OR at least one mutation in the CFTR gene that is responsive to Trikafta based on clinical and/or in vitro data? For the latter, please specify the evidence of responsiveness in the comments box. For Alyftrek patients, does the patient have a confirmed diagnosis of cystic fibrosis with at least one mutation in the CFTR gene as listed in the Health Canada product monograph or CDA-AMC reimbursement recommendation?", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100.0, "optionHeight" : 100.0, "imageCountInRow" : 3.0, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: ElexacaftorTezacaftorIvacaftor_InitialSubmission_Assessment_Q30
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 4, "label" : "What is the patient's age?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : "32000", "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: ElexacaftorTezacaftorIvacaftor_InitialSubmission_Assessment_Q7
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Is patient optimized with best supportive care", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100.0, "optionHeight" : 100.0, "imageCountInRow" : 3.0, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: ElexacaftorTezacaftorIvacaftor_InitialSubmission_Assessment_Textblock_Q1
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "ppFEV1 (%)", "text" : "ppFEV1 (%)", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: ElexacaftorTezacaftorIvacaftor_InitialSubmission_Assessment_Textblock_Q10
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Sweat chloride (mmol/litre) and date.", "text" : "Sweat chloride (mmol/litre) and date.", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: ElexacaftorTezacaftorIvacaftor_InitialSubmission_Assessment_Textblock_Q2
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Lung Clearance Index (LCI 2.5)", "text" : "Lung Clearance Index (LCI 2.5)", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: ElexacaftorTezacaftorIvacaftor_InitialSubmission_Assessment_Textblock_Q3
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Total number of days for which patient received oral and/or intravenous antibiotics for pulmonary exacerbations in the 6 months prior to submission date.", "text" : "Total number of days for which patient received oral and/or intravenous antibiotics for pulmonary exacerbations in the 6 months prior to submission date.", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: ElexacaftorTezacaftorIvacaftor_InitialSubmission_Assessment_Textblock_Q4
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Total number of pulmonary exacerbations requiring oral and/or intravenous antibiotics in the 6 months prior to submission date.", "text" : "Total number of pulmonary exacerbations requiring oral and/or intravenous antibiotics in the 6 months prior to submission date.", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: ElexacaftorTezacaftorIvacaftor_InitialSubmission_Assessment_Textblock_Q5
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Total Number of CF related hospitalizations in the 6 months prior to submission date.", "text" : "Total Number of CF related hospitalizations in the 6 months prior to submission date.", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: ElexacaftorTezacaftorIvacaftor_InitialSubmission_Assessment_Textblock_Q6
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Height (cm) and date (for < 18 years, add percentile in the comment box).", "text" : "Height (cm) and date (for < 18 years, add percentile in the comment box).", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: ElexacaftorTezacaftorIvacaftor_InitialSubmission_Assessment_Textblock_Q7
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Weight (kilograms) and date (for < 18 years, add percentile in the comment box).", "text" : "Weight (kilograms) and date (for < 18 years, add percentile in the comment box).", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false, "lwcComponentOverride" : "" }

childElements.name: ElexacaftorTezacaftorIvacaftor_InitialSubmission_Assessment_Textblock_Q8
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "BMI (kg/m2) and date (for < 18 years, add percentile in the comment box).", "text" : "BMI (kg/m2) and date (for < 18 years, add percentile in the comment box).", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: ElexacaftorTezacaftorIvacaftor_InitialSubmission_Assessment_Textblock_Q9
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "CFQ-R respiratory domain score and date.If the patient has switched from using one type of the questionnaire to another since your last application, indicate in the comments box what type they were using before and what type they are currently using.If there are any other positive or negative changes in quality of life that a relevant to review, outline those in the comments box.", "text" : "CFQ-R respiratory domain score and date.If the patient has switched from using one type of the questionnaire to another since your last application, indicate in the comments box what type they were using before and what type they are currently using.If there are any other positive or negative changes in quality of life that a relevant to review, outline those in the comments box.", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: Elexacaftor_InitialSubmission_DrugTreatmentPlan_Q1
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Has the patient been started on the requested drug prior to EDRD approval?:", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100.0, "optionHeight" : 100.0, "imageCountInRow" : 3.0, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "If Patient is currently receiving drug being requested for funding, then please indicate date therapy started:", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : "32000", "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: elexacaftor/tezacaftor/ivacaftor-InitialSubmission
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "elexacaftor/tezacaftor/ivacaftor - Initial Submission", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3.0, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3.0, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000.0, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000.0, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : true, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
